human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_b: CP00-019 closes RP00.P02.M06.S03 after final validation and commit, keeps RP00.P02.M06 open, and hands off to RP00.P02.M06.S04 without claiming runtime route creation, service execution, fixture generation, fixture persistence, entity registry mutation, human approval replacement, database writes, storage writes, product-state persistence, or real data use.
